UR27400	Receive 5 Rare Catseyes

combo_list: Blue Strike — Research Power Up(XL)
Yellow Strike — "Immune to Waves" Effects Activated
Green Strike — Deploy Cost Down(XL)
Pink Strike — Unit Speed Up(XL)
Royal Barrage — Unit Attack Up(M)
Wilderness Wail — "Massive Damage" Effects Up(Sm)
